text: FROM THE CREATORS OF Tangled & WRECK-IT RALPH
A majestic castle is illuminated under a twilight sky. A fountain arcs gracefully in the background.
A single purple flower blooms in the, Olaf enters, delighted
original_texts: A single purple flower blooms in a snowy landscape surrounded by snow-covered pine trees.
Olaf, the snowman, walks into the frame from the left, looking surprised and delighted at the sight of the flower.

text: Olaf leans to smell a flower; his carrot nose pops off, lands on ice, leaving Olaf stunned.
original_texts: Olaf leans down to smell the flower, his expression one of pure joy and wonder.
Suddenly, Olaf's carrot nose falls off as he reacts with shock and dismay.
The camera follows the flying carrot nose as it lands on the icy ground, while Olaf remains frozen in place.

text: Sven looks surprised, then grins wide. Olaf steps on the ice, confused. Sven slips and falls forward on the ice.
original_texts: Sven, the reindeer, appears surprised and then excitedly opens his mouth wide.
Olaf, the snowman, is seen stepping on ice with a look of surprise.
Sven cautiously steps onto the ice, looking unsure of himself.
Olaf steps on the ice, but not able to move. He looks confused.
Sven loses his balance and falls forward onto the ice.

text: Olaf uses his twig arm to cross the frozen lake. He slips, scattering his parts. Sven skids in—Olaf reassembles quickly. His head pops off, but he puts it back. The reindeer slides, adding to the chaos.
original_texts: Olaf is using his twig arm to move across frozen lake.
Olaf loses his balance and falls onto the ice, scattering his parts.
A reindeer skids into the scene, nearly colliding with Olaf, who quickly reassembles himself.
Olaf's head pops off as he tumbles over, but he humorously puts it back on.
The reindeer slips and slides across the ice, adding to the comedic chaos.

text: Sven reaches for a frozen carrot—his tongue sticks. Olaf, in pieces, pulls with a stick. They struggle; the carrot flies onto a snowy patch.
original_texts: Sven, the reindeer, looking excited at the carrot with his tounge out but his tounge sticks to the ice.
Olaf appears to be in pieces with his head and limbs separated.
Olaf's head rolls towards Sven. Olaf uses a stick to grab the carrot pulling it towards himself
Sven touches the carrot with his mouth. The carrot flies across the lake landing on a snowy area nearby.

text: Olaf looks surprised as Sven gets up and runs past him.
original_texts: Olaf has look of surprise on his face.
Sven gets up and runs past Olaf.

text: Sven runs hurriedly as Olaf grabs on, then clutches his head and looks around confused.
original_texts: Sven runs hurriedly, Olaf grabs onto Sven.
Olaf grabs his head and looks around with a confused expression.

text: Sven returns, Olaf looks surprised with his carrot nose reattached. Sven jumps happily, then falls in front of Olaf.
original_texts: Sven returns, Olaf looks surpised with carrot nose attached back on this face.
Sven jumps happily before falling in front of Olaf

text: Olaf, surprised, grabs his carrot nose with twig arms - his head is missing.
original_texts: Olaf looks surprise then grabs onto his carrot nose with his twig arms.
